channel.title: summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

item.title: The U.S. seizes another oil tanker as peace talks with Iran remain in limbo
item.description: The seizure comes after President Trump told Fox News Wednesday that there was "no time pressure" on the ceasefire with Iran, which he has extended in...

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints — more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
item.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the S...

item.title: Candidates for California Governor Debate: 5 Takeaways
item.description: The nonpartisan primary remains volatile after the departure of Eric Swalwell. A televised debate featured six leading candidates, but produced few fi...

item.title: Mamdani Considers Delaying Pension-Fund Payments to Ease Budget Gap
item.description: With New York City facing a multibillion-dollar deficit, Mayor Zohran Mamdani is exploring ways to delay the city’s payments to municipal pension fund...

item.title: An Independent Senate Hopeful Tries to Scare Off Montana Democrats
item.description: Seth Bodnar, an independent, could have the best chance of breaking the Republican stranglehold in Montana, but the state’s Democrats are choosing to ...

item.title: Combative, Defensive and Occasionally Contrite, Kennedy Walks a Fine Line
item.description: In four days of congressional testimony, the health secretary sought to please the White House and his MAHA base at the same time.

item.title: As U.S. Brands Stumble, China Wins Over Young Indonesians
item.description: A new generation of Indonesian consumers view Chinese brands as high-tech and of good quality, a departure from the days when “made in China” was asso...

item.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Threatens Iranian Boats He Says Are Mining the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump’s latest threats came after the Pentagon said the U.S. military had boarded a second tanker carrying oil from Iran. Both sides are try...

item.title: U.S. forces stop a second tanker they say is carrying Iranian oil.
As U.S. Brands Stumble, China Wins Over Young Indonesians
item.description: A new generation of Indonesian consumers view Chinese brands as high-tech and of good quality, a departure from the days when “made in China” was asso...

item.title: Germany, a Steadfast Ally of Israel, Now Voices Some Frustration
item.description: In recent weeks, German officials have issued critical comments about Israel that convey Berlin’s recent frustration with its longtime ally.
